While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. title: Goethe-Institut USA | San Francisco
content: Learn German at the Goethe-Institut, the international leader in German language instruction. Whether for your career, your studies, or your move to Germany—our programs will help you succeed. The Goethe-Institut is the Federal Republic of Germany’s cultural institute, active worldwide. Celebrate the quirks and thrills of soccer fandom at Goethe-Institut San Francisco with Marc Rothemund’s heartfelt comedy, *Weekend Rebels*! Based on the book *We Weekend Rebels* by Mirco and Jason von Juterczenka, *Weekend Rebels* cheerfully explores the passions of soccer fandom culture—its superstitions, rituals, and inner conflicts—through the eyes of a special and very discerning lover of the game. Subscribe to our newsletter and receive the latest news from the Goethe-Institut San Francisco. Learn German online with the experts of Goethe-Institut USA! The Goethe-Institut USA is Germany's offical cultural center with  convenient and effective German online courses as well as internationally recognized language certificates. Stream all of the Goethe-Institut’s curated series of German films from one platform, always for free.
